! Description: Domain set for Whatsapp traffic routing.

! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-26 02:45:09 UTC
! Total: 4
! Breakdown: service_rules=4

! WhatsApp
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||whatsapp.com^                           ! WhatsApp - main platform
||whatsapp.net^                           ! WhatsApp - messaging infrastructure
||web.whatsapp.com^                       ! WhatsApp Web
||wa.me^                                  ! WhatsApp - short links
